name: VetriCinema
email_subject: SUBJECT: New voice and original songs for VetriCinema
email_body:
Watching the kind of stories VetriCinema brings to life from Chennai to Kerala, there's a raw honesty that I always try to mirror in my music. I’m an indie singer-songwriter and composer creating original tracks in Malayalam, Tamil, and English. From the melancholic notes of 'Neermathalam Kozhinja Sandhya' to the Tamil melodies of 'En Swaasame', my work is about capturing real, resonant moments. I’m currently looking to collaborate on playback singing, background scores, or original compositions for your upcoming film projects.
